name: Altium Designer
description: Altium Designer is a useful pcb design surface inside Electrical Engineering.
whyUseIt: People in Electrical Engineering use Altium Designer to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Altium Designer as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
